boundary_notes: No new citation is added by this register.
No real biological data, pathogen simulation, receptor parameter, or host targeting may be introduced.
Metrics must remain abstract and unitless.
Coherence work must not soften safety exclusions.
Contribution language must not imply validation, proof, readiness, or real-biological applicability.
No fake citation or unsupported literature claim may be introduced.
Limitations may be organized but not weakened.
No proof claim may be made until a future official proof milestone exists.
External validation is not completed or approximated here.
This register does not approve submission readiness.
Reproducibility must not include real biological workflows or operational instructions.
This register grants no permission to modify manuscript files.
